name: Dezron Douglas
abstract: Dezron Lamont Douglas is an American jazz double bassist, composer and producer.

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: On the live show it’ll be Winard Harper and Jason [Marsalis] alternating – my little brother – Dezron Douglas on bass, Mark Gross on saxophone.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Davis
about_quotes.evidence: People like Dezron Douglas, the bassist who’s playing with everybody.
about_quotes.doc_title: Steve Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, December 15, 2017
